This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

## Original Description
OpenClaw before 2026.5.12 contains an information disclosure vulnerability in streamable-http MCP servers that forwards operator-configured custom headers during cross-origin redirects. Attackers controlling or compromising an MCP endpoint can redirect requests to exfiltrate sensitive headers like API keys or tenant-routing credentials to attacker-controlled origins.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-x7cf-6gp3-q5f8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-17T17:54:46Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7cf-6gp3-q5f8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-x7cf-6gp3-q5f8"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-16T19:17:00Z", "published_at": "2026-06-16T21:31:57Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-rjxq-qqhf-8hwh", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-53840", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-custom-header-leakage-via-mcp-streamable-http-cross-origin-redirects", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7cf-6gp3-q5f8"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: MCP Streamable HTTP redirects could forward configured custom headers to another origin", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-17T17:54:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-x7cf-6gp3-q5f8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.5.12"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-06-17T17:54:46Z"}
